bodyText: You're back online We use cookies to measure performance and improve your experience. Privacy policy Manage cookies Skip to main content · AHPRA-registered doctors Hair loss assessment, without the waiting room. Complete a secure clinical form. We only interrupt you if something important is missing. A doctor reviews the pattern, history, and next step. Full refund if our doctor can't help. Evidence-based assessment. Your doctor decides what is clinically appropriate. Start assessment · $49.95 Takes about 3 minutes. Full refund if our doctor can't help. STEP 1 Assessment submitted Pattern and history captured STEP 2 Doctor review Suitability and safety checked STEP 3 Outcome sent Advice or eScript if appropriate Private review · eScript by SMS if approved Sent via SMS Clinical review Assessment submitted 5m ago Doctor reviewing Now Outcome sent If approved Accepting requests Hair Loss: Submit 24/7 CLINICAL, NOT COSMETIC Clinical hair loss assessment. Reviewed by a doctor. A structured doctor review for hair loss concerns. Once approved, your eScript is sent by SMS and can be used at any Australian pharmacy. Three steps. Completely private. No booked appointment or waiting room. We only interrupt you if something important is missing. 1 Fill a short health form Quick assessment covering your hair loss pattern and health history. Takes about 2 minutes. ~2 minutes 2 A real doctor reviews it An AHPRA-registered doctor reviews your assessment and decides the next step. ~44 min 3 Outcome sent to you Once approved, your eScript is sent by SMS and can be used at an Australian pharmacy. After review Start your assessment Why go online? Start the review from home. INSTANTMED ~1hr GP CLINIC 2+hrs 2-min health form Doctor reviews privately Outcome by SMS Book appointment Travel + wait in clinic Face-to-face consult Assessment What the doctor checks The service starts with clinical review, not a menu of medicines. Hair-loss pattern Assessment factor The doctor reviews where thinning started, how quickly it has changed, and whether the pattern fits online assessment. Type Pattern Frequency Timing Results Photos Best for Next step Health history Safety check Your answers help the doctor check medical history, current medications, and reasons online care may not be suitable. Type History Frequency Current meds Results Suitability Best for Safety Your preference Shared decision You can explain what you want help with. The doctor decides what is clinically appropriate after review. No automated clinical decisions. Verify any doctor's registration on the AHPRA public register Pricing One flat fee. No hidden costs. You only pay if the doctor can help.
